[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" theme_builder_area="post_content" module_id="msc-about" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default"][et_pb_row column_structure="3_5,2_5" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_column type="3_5" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

What We Do

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

About My Studio Channel

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

My Studio Channel helps creators launch their own television-style platforms online. From talk shows and cooking shows to podcasts and documentaries, we design clean, organized websites that showcase programming the way a real network would.

Because we're creators too, we understand what it takes to present your work professionally. Every platform includes a custom built-in plugin with step-by-step tutorials, plus access to our creator community for continued learning and support.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="2_5" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_image src="/media/what-we-do.jpg" alt="what-we-do" title_text="what-we-do.jpg" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content" show_in_lightbox="off" url_new_window="off" align="center" force_fullwidth="off" always_center_on_mobile="on"][/et_pb_image][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure="1_4,1_4,1_4,1_4" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_column type="1_4" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" text_orientation="center" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Network-Style Layouts

Present your content like a professional streaming network with structured shows and episodes.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_4" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" text_orientation="center" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Creator Community

Access our exclusive creator community for continued learning and support as your channel grows.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_4" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" text_orientation="center" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Built-In Tutorials

Custom plugin with step-by-step tutorials so you never feel left figuring things out alone.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_4" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" text_orientation="center" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Ongoing Support

Direct communication with the team building your site, plus guided walkthrough after launch.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" theme_builder_area="post_content" module_id="msc-services" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default"][et_pb_row module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_column type="4_4" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" text_orientation="center" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Designed for Every Genre

Programming Styles We Support

Whether you're launching a talk show, cooking show, podcast, or full series, your channel can be organized and presented like a professional network.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure="1_2,1_2" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_column type="1_2" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]
  • ✓Interview Talk Show
  • ✓Daytime Talk Show
  • ✓Panel Talk Show
  • ✓Late-Night Show
  • ✓Lifestyle Show
  • ✓DIY Creative
  • ✓Cooking Show
  • ✓Drama Series
[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_2" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_image src="/media/see-what-channel.jpg" alt="Channel preview" title_text="see-what-channel.jpg" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content" show_in_lightbox="off" url_new_window="off" align="center" force_fullwidth="off" always_center_on_mobile="on"][/et_pb_image][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure="1_4,1_4,1_4,1_4" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_column type="1_4" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" text_orientation="left" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Network-style layout that organizes your shows like a professional channel

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_4" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" text_orientation="left" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Custom video players designed for a polished viewing experience

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_4" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" text_orientation="left" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Structured programming layout that makes it easy for viewers to explore

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_4" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" text_orientation="left" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Scalable platform design that can grow with your channel

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" theme_builder_area="post_content" module_id="msc-own-platform" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default"][et_pb_row column_structure="3_5,2_5" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_column type="3_5" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Full Ownership

Own Your Platform, Not Just a Page

My Studio Channel isn't a hosted service — it's your platform, built for you, on your own domain, with no recurring platform fees. You keep full control.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

No Platform Lock-in

Your platform is built for you to own and operate independently. No monthly subscriptions, no per-subscriber fees.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

You Control Everything

You control the content. You control your audience. You control how it grows.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Built With You

Every project is built with you involved in the process. You will meet with us, see the progress, and understand how your platform works before it launches.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="2_5" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_image src="/media/own-platform.jpg" alt="Own your platform" title_text="own-platform.jpg" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content" show_in_lightbox="off" url_new_window="off" align="center" force_fullwidth="off" always_center_on_mobile="on"][/et_pb_image][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" theme_builder_area="post_content" module_id="msc-packages" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default"][et_pb_row module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_column type="4_4" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Packages

Channel Packages

Choose the package that fits your vision. Every package includes a professionally designed platform with our custom Studio Channel plugin.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure="1_3,1_3,1_3" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" Live Examples

View Demo Channels

Explore sample channel layouts built with My Studio Channel — each styled like a professional network.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure="3_5,2_5" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_column type="3_5" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_image src="/media/demo-talkshow.jpg" alt="Talk Show Network" title_text="demo-talkshow.jpg" url="#" url_new_window="off" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content" show_in_lightbox="off" align="center" force_fullwidth="off" always_center_on_mobile="on"][/et_pb_image][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Talk Show Network

Interview and guest-focused layout with episodes, seasons, and spotlight areas for hosts and topics.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="2_5" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_image src="/media/demo-podcast.jpg" alt="Podcast Network" title_text="demo-podcast.jpg" url="#" url_new_window="off" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content" show_in_lightbox="off" align="left" force_fullwidth="off" always_center_on_mobile="on"][/et_pb_image][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Podcast Network

Episode grids, show pages, and audio-first presentation.

Cooking Channel

Series, episodes, and rich visual presentation for food content.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_spacer _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" height="16px"][/et_pb_spacer][et_pb_image src="/media/demo-documentary.jpg" alt="Film Studio" title_text="demo-documentary.jpg" url="#" url_new_window="off" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content" show_in_lightbox="off" align="left" force_fullwidth="off" always_center_on_mobile="on"][/et_pb_image][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Talk Show

Late-night and daytime talk formats with structured programming rows.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" theme_builder_area="post_content" module_id="msc-requirements" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default"][et_pb_row column_structure="3_5,2_5" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_column type="3_5" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Before You Start

What You'll Need to Get Started

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Images & Show Artwork

High-resolution logos, professional headshots, and any specific branding graphics (layered .PSD or .AI files are preferred if available).

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Thumbnails

Eye-catching, high-contrast images (1920 x 1080px) that clearly represent your episodes or categories at a glance.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Video and/or Audio Files

Direct download links (Dropbox/Drive) or hosted URLs (YouTube/Vimeo) for the primary media content you want featured on the site.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Domain Name

The registered web address (URL) you intend to use, along with the login credentials for your registrar (e.g., SiteGround or Spaceship).

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Hosting Account Access

Login credentials for your hosting provider (e.g., SiteGround, Cloudways). We recommend managed WordPress hosting for optimal performance.

How It Works

A Simple, Guided Process

Get your platform built and ready to launch in four straightforward steps.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure="1_4,1_4,1_4,1_4" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_column type="1_4" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" text_orientation="center" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

01

Book Your Consultation

We start with a call to understand your goals and determine the right setup for your platform.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_4" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" text_orientation="center" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

02

03

Build & Review

04

Your site is finalized, delivered, and ready for you to manage and grow.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" theme_builder_area="post_content" module_id="msc-experience" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default"][et_pb_row column_structure="3_5,2_5" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_column type="3_5" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Our Background

Built on Experience, Not Guesswork

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

We've been creating content and working with creators for over two decades. From early content production with Every Way Woman to building platforms through Inavizion Media and My Creative Space, our work has always centered around helping creators bring their ideas to life.

Since 2000, we've designed and built websites for clients across industries, with a focus on creators, entrepreneurs, and media-based businesses. Today, My Studio Channel brings that experience together — helping creators launch their own platform with structure, clarity, and real support.

Who we've worked with

  • Creators and entrepreneurs through My Creative Space
  • Content creators, filmmakers, and brands through Inavizion Media
  • Clients from website builds, content capture, and coaching programs
  • Ongoing work with creators launching platforms through My Studio Channel
[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="2_5" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_image src="/media/creator-in-mind.jpg" alt="creator in mind" title_text="creator-in-mind.jpg" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content" show_in_lightbox="off" url_new_window="off" align="center" force_fullwidth="off" always_center_on_mobile="on"][/et_pb_image][et_pb_spacer _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" height="24px"][/et_pb_spacer][et_pb_image src="/media/camera-crew.jpg" alt="camera crew" title_text="camera-crew.jpg" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content" show_in_lightbox="off" url_new_window="off" align="center" force_fullwidth="off" always_center_on_mobile="on"][/et_pb_image][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" theme_builder_area="post_content" module_id="msc-faq" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default"][et_pb_row module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_column type="4_4" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

FAQ

Common Inquiries

Find answers to the most frequently asked questions about our services and processes.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_column type="4_4" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_toggle title="Why does pricing start at $5,800?" open="off" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

This includes professional video setup, custom plugin installation, consulting, and studio-style layout work. Each platform is built with care to ensure it meets professional network standards.

[/et_pb_toggle][et_pb_toggle title="Do I own my website and content?" open="off" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Yes. You fully own your site and all content. Unlike platforms that charge monthly fees and hold your content hostage, your platform is built for you to own and operate independently forever.

[/et_pb_toggle][et_pb_toggle title="Do you provide hosting or domains?" open="off" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

No, but we assist with setup and provide recommendations for reliable hosting providers. This keeps you in control of your infrastructure and costs.

[/et_pb_toggle][et_pb_toggle title="Do you host videos?" open="off" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

No, we connect your videos using professional players or platforms like Bunny.net. This gives you flexibility and control over your video hosting costs and performance.

[/et_pb_toggle][et_pb_toggle title="What if I don't have thumbnails or artwork?" open="off" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Thumbnail and artwork creation is available as an add-on service. We can create professional thumbnails, show artwork, and promotional graphics that match your brand.

[/et_pb_toggle][et_pb_toggle title="What do I need for consulting calls?" open="off" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Consulting calls must be attended on a desktop or laptop browser for optimal screen sharing. Mobile devices and tablets are not supported for these sessions.

[/et_pb_toggle][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" theme_builder_area="post_content" module_id="msc-policies" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default"][et_pb_row module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_column type="4_4" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Policies

Policies & Requirements

To begin your Studio Channel project, please review the following policies. Understanding these ensures a smooth, on-schedule build from start to launch.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_column type="4_4" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Signed Agreement Required

A signed agreement is required before project commencement. This protects both you and our team and ensures all terms are clearly understood before work begins.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Payment via PayPal Only

Payment is accepted via PayPal only. A 50% non-refundable deposit is required to begin work. The remaining balance is paid in two installments: 25% mid-project and 25% prior to launch.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Materials Submitted Before Work Begins

All required content, assets, and materials must be submitted before your project can begin. Delays in submission may impact your project timeline.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Client Responsibility for Accuracy

Clients are responsible for providing accurate and complete materials, including text, images, video links, and branding elements.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Revisions Are Package-Based

Revisions are limited to the terms of the selected package. Additional revisions beyond what is included may require an additional fee.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Consulting Calls on Desktop Only

Consulting calls must be attended on a desktop or laptop using a web browser. Mobile devices and tablets are not supported for screen sharing sessions.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card msc-policy-highlight" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

72-Hour Response Window

All communication and approvals must be completed within 72 hours to keep the project on schedule. Delays in response may result in adjustments to the project timeline.
